title: Ex-CIA 'psychic spy' unmasks secret alien bases inside mountains with UFO repair shops
description: Retired army intelligence officer Lyn Buchanan has identified the exact coordinates of secret alien bases hidden inside mountains around the world.

title: Pentagon's UFO Files Capture Mysterious Human-Shaped Aerial Object: Hovering Figure Vanishes At Impossible Speed
description: Humanoid UFO footage sparks global debate over mysterious aerial object A viral U.S. military UFO video allegedly showing a humanoid-shaped object has sparked global debate after a Chinese expert described it as baffling. The footage, widely shared online, shows an unidentified object with unusual movement patterns, but experts caution that no evidence confirms extraterrestrial origin. The incident has reignited discussions around UAP transparency and military surveillance data.

title: Ex-CIA 'Psychic Spy' Unmasks Hidden Alien Bases and UFO Workshops Inside 4 Mountains
description: Former CIA-linked 'psychic spy' Lyn Buchanan has claimed that alien bases and UFO repair hubs are hidden inside four remote mountains, from Alaska to Zimbabwe.

title: Brazil man’s chilling UFO sighting sparks frenzy after giant disc appears over mountains; Watch
description: A bizarre sighting in rural Brazil has fueled speculation after a towering unidentified object appeared at dusk.

title: Ex-CIA 'psychic spy' unmasks secret alien bases inside mountains with UFO repair shops
description: Former CIA psychic spy Lyn Buchanan, a decorated army intelligence veteran, claims top-secret alien bases with UFO repair shops and transit hubs are hidden inside remote mountains
